comments.comment: On December 31, 2019 the Oshawa Assembly Operations ceased the production of 4 wheeled self propelled vehicles and transitioned to the new business of producing service and replacement parts. This caused an innate change in production usage, which is reflected in the RY2020 constituent usages here.
